# autoresearch

> Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. A unified CLI tool that lets AI agents read and search across 12+ platforms — Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu, Instagram, LinkedIn, Boss Zhipin, RSS, and any web page. One install, zero API fees.

## Quick Start

- [Installation Guide](https://github.com/Code7unner/autoresearch/blob/main/docs/install.md): Step-by-step setup instructions for AI agents
- [README](https://github.com/Code7unner/autoresearch/blob/main/README.md): Full documentation

## Core Commands

- [CLI Usage](https://github.com/Code7unner/autoresearch/blob/main/docs/install.md): `autoresearch read <url>` reads any URL, `autoresearch search-twitter "query"` searches Twitter, etc.

## Key Features

- Read any URL: tweets, Reddit posts, YouTube videos (transcripts), GitHub repos, articles, XiaoHongShu notes, Bilibili videos, RSS feeds
- Search across platforms: Twitter/X, Reddit, GitHub, YouTube, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu, Instagram, LinkedIn, Boss Zhipin, Web (via Exa)
- Self-diagnosis: `autoresearch doctor` checks what works and what needs setup
- Auto-installs dependencies: `autoresearch install --env=auto`
- Cookie-based auth for platforms that require login (Twitter, XiaoHongShu, Instagram)
- Proxy support for platforms that block server IPs (Reddit, Bilibili)
- Zero API fees: all backends are free and open-source (bird CLI, yt-dlp, Jina Reader, instaloader, etc.)

## Troubleshooting

- [Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/Code7unner/autoresearch/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions

## Optional

- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/Code7unner/autoresearch/blob/main/autoresearch/skill/SKILL.md): Integration guide for AI agent frameworks (OpenClaw, Claude Code, etc.)
- [PyPI Package](https://pypi.org/project/autoresearch/): `pip install autoresearch`
